title: Cross-Platform Social Network Build
desc:
I’m planning a full-featured social networking product that runs smoothly on iOS, Android, and the web from a single, maintainable code-base. The core experience centres on three essentials: personal user profiles, a real-time messaging system, and a scrolling news feed that surfaces updates and media.

My priority is clean architecture that scales—think modular backend (Node.js, Django or similar), responsive front-end (React Native, Flutter, or comparable), and a database layer ready for growth. Security best practices, push notifications, and basic analytics need to be in place from the first build so we can iterate quickly once users come on board.

Deliverables:
• Universal code-base compiled for iOS, Android, and web  
• Profile creation/editing flow with image upload and privacy controls  
• One-to-one and group messaging with online/offline status indicators  
• Infinite-scroll news feed pulling posts in chronological order  
• Initial deployment to TestFlight, Google Play Internal Test, and a staging web server, plus hand-off documentation

Acceptance criteria will be a walkthrough video and live test links showing every feature above performing without critical bugs. If you have a proven track record shipping similar cross-platform social apps, let’s talk roadmap and timeline.

title: Convert Large Excel VBA Application to Python (Excel Front-End Retained) — Experienced Migration Specialist
desc:
We are converting a mature, commercially deployed Excel-based financial/audit automation application from VBA to Python. The Excel workbook front-end and custom ribbon stay; all processing logic moves to a Python engine running behind Excel.
THE SYSTEM:
• ~56,000 lines of VBA across a main workbook and add-ins, developed and patched over 15+ years
• Modules include: data import and mapping wizards, journal/adjustment engines, configurable settings panels, analytical calculations, multi-step report generation wizards, sampling tools, and a cash flow statement engine
• Full installed environment, source code, and user documentation will be provided under NDA
SCOPE OF WORK:
	1.	PLANNING PHASE: Analyze the VBA codebase and produce a technical planning document — module inventory, proposed Python architecture, data structures, QA approach, and time budget. Three client-provided test data sets will be supplied as the QA benchmark.
	2.	DEVELOPMENT: Clean re-architecture (not line-by-line transliteration). Legacy resource-file dependencies replaced with JSON/config structures. Report boilerplate externalized to editable template files. Modular, documented, deduplicated code.
	3.	PARITY TESTING & UAT SUPPORT: Python outputs must match the existing VBA outputs on the agreed test data sets. Defect fixes during the client UAT window on a fast turnaround (blockers within 2 business days).
REQUIRED SKILLS:
• Proven experience reading and reverse-engineering large legacy VBA codebases
• Str

title: Drive Subscription Sales Online
desc:
I run a company built around subscription-based services and I’m ready to scale our client base. To make that happen, I need an online sales representative who can own the full sales cycle through email marketing and social-media outreach.

Here’s what the role looks like day-to-day: you’ll research and qualify prospects, craft attention-grabbing email sequences, post and engage on platforms such as LinkedIn, Facebook or Instagram, and then follow up to guide interested leads through to sign-up. Phone calls are handled by another team, so your focus will stay squarely on digital channels.

You should be comfortable using common tools—think Mailchimp or a comparable ESP for automated campaigns, a mainstream CRM like HubSpot or Pipedrive to track pipeline activity, and native social-media schedulers or apps like Buffer for posting. Solid written English, an eye for persuasive copy, and data-driven thinking are essential.

Deliverables I’m expecting:  
• Weekly prospect list with contact details and segmentation notes  
• Two to three email sequences per week, ready for scheduling  
• A social-media content calendar with daily engagement actions  
• CRM updates that clearly show opportunity stage and next steps  
• Short weekly report highlighting wins, challenges and metrics

Hit the ground running, demonstrate consistent conversions, and there’s room for a long-term collaboration with performance-based incentives.

title: Facebook Growth Hacker Needed
desc:
Uncle Tim’s Topicals is ready to turn casual scrollers into raving fans and buyers on Facebook, and I need a results-driven growth hacker to make it happen.

Here is the challenge:  
• Rapidly lift page likes and widen our organic reach so we are no longer at the mercy of the algorithm.  
• Craft scroll-stopping copy, graphics, and Reels that spotlight our topical wellness products and convert attention into sales.  
• Funnel highly targeted traffic from Facebook straight to our checkout flow.

You’ll be free to test, learn, and optimise; I’m deliberately hiring a pro because I’m unsure which content mix (educational posts, product showcases, testimonials, or something completely fresh) will resonate most. I can supply logo files, colour palettes, tone-of-voice notes, and any other brand guidelines you need, but creativity is encouraged.

What I’m looking for in your proposal:  
1. A brief outline of the growth framework or tactics you’d pilot in the first 30 days.  
2. A few links or screenshots that prove you’ve scaled Facebook pages before—especially in health, wellness, or e-commerce.  
3. Your pricing model (hourly, package, or milestone-based).

If you live for data-backed experimentation, understand Facebook’s ever-shifting landscape, and can speak to consumers who care about natural relief and better living, let’s talk.

title: Complete App Branding Package
desc:
My mobile app is almost ready to ship and I now need a cohesive visual package that makes it shine in the stores and on social media. The scope is four-fold:

• A distinctive app logo delivered in vector (SVG/AI) and PNG formats, ready for every iOS and Android icon size.  
• Store screenshots for both platforms, exported at all required resolutions, visually consistent with the logo and UI while clearly communicating key features.  
• An animated splash screen (3-5 sec) built around the final logo and supplied as Lottie JSON or MP4 plus the layered source.  
• A short teaser video (20-30 sec, 1080p) suitable for Apple App Preview, Google Play and social channels, combining UI captures with light motion graphics and royalty-free music.

I will supply the existing UI, a brief brand mood board and copy points. Please handle concept, design, animation and basic sound design. All artwork must be original and fully licensed to me on delivery.

Acceptance: final files render correctly on target devices, meet App Store & Google Play specs, and stay under their upload size limits.

If you have a portfolio that shows clean logos, polished mobile screenshots and concise promo videos, I would love to review it and discuss timelines.

title: AI Content Writer, Railway Education
desc:
# AI Content Writer & Editor (Railway Education) – Long-Term Remote Project

## Budget

**₹10,000–20,000 per month (Negotiable based on experience)**

**Project Type:** Part-Time | Long-Term | Remote

---

# About the Project

I am building one of India's leading digital learning platforms for **Indian Railway LDCE (30%), JE, SSE, AME and Mechanical Department examinations**.

I have a large collection of:

* Railway Manuals
* Railway Board Circulars
* Coaching Notes
* Previous Year Question Papers
* Question Banks
* Technical PDFs
* Workshop Documents
* Official Railway Publications

I am looking for an AI-savvy content writer and editor who can convert these documents into premium educational content.

**This is NOT a research job.**

I will provide all source materials. Your responsibility is to transform them into high-quality original educational content.

---

# Responsibilities

Using AI tools such as ChatGPT, Claude, NotebookLM, Gemini or similar, create:

### Weekly Blog Articles

* 1,500–3,000 words
* SEO-friendly
* Easy to understand
* Original content
* Proper headings and formatting

---

### Monthly Railway e-Magazine

Create one professionally written digital magazine every month.

Approximately **40–60 pages** containing:

* Railway Technical Articles
* Concept Explanations
* Previous Year Question Analysis
* Workshop Best Practices
* Railway Current Developments
* Railway Board Circular Summaries
* Safety Corner
* Mechanical Engineering Concepts
* Interview Q

title: Hindi-English Product Review Articles
desc:
I need a skilled writer to craft bilingual Hindi-English product-review articles that promote my e-commerce catalogue. Each article will focus on three to five of our items and put them side-by-side with key competitor offerings, giving readers a clear sense of why our products stand out.

You’ll blend clear feature explanations, honest pros and cons, and persuasive calls-to-action, all while moving naturally between Hindi and English so the content feels fluid to a North-Indian online shopper who appreciates Hinglish. Solid SEO structure—engaging headline, sub-heads, and a concise meta description—should be woven in rather than bolted on.

Deliver each article as an editable Google Doc (or Word file) with:
• 3–5 in-depth product sections, each followed by a brief competitor comparison  
• A short intro that sets context and a conclusion that nudges purchase

Originality is vital; I’ll run a plagiarism check. If you’ve previously written bilingual reviews, share a sample link when you bid so I can gauge tone and flow. Let’s discuss article length, keyword list, and publication schedule once we connect.

title: Remote Debt Settlement Executive Needed (India)
desc:
Debt Settlement Case Executive | Call Forwarding | Remote (India)
Description
Marathe CredCare Services is looking for a Debt Settlement Case Executive to handle client communication and case coordination.
Responsibilities
Answer incoming client calls and WhatsApp messages.
Explain the debt settlement process.
Collect loan documents and maintain case files.

Follow up with clients regarding pending documents and fees.

Comfortable working remotely.

Engagement

title: Crypto Exchange Business Developer Acquisition Partnership
desc:
I represent a leading global crypto exchange and I’m ready to sign a formal partnership agreement focused on rapid user acquisition. The core tactic is influencer collaborations—bringing in credible voices on X (Twitter), YouTube, TikTok and Telegram who can turn their audiences into verified, depositing traders on our platform.

Here’s the scope I need you to drive:
• Locate and vet crypto, trading or finance influencers with genuine, engaged followings.  
• Negotiate win-win terms built around CPA, revenue-share or hybrid structures.  
• Coordinate creatives, referral links and tracking with our in-house stack (Adjust, custom referral dashboard, REST/WebSocket APIs).  
• Launch, monitor and optimise campaigns to hit conversion KPIs:  first deposits and trading volume.

Deliverables
1. Countersigned influencer agreements covering a combined reach of 1 million+ followers.  
2. A launch calendar that maps creatives, timelines and target metrics.  
3. Weekly performance reports detailing spend, registrations, cost per acquisition and ROI.

If you already have strong relationships with crypto KOLs and can prove past growth wins for exchanges, I’d like to move quickly on this.

title: Remote Railway Exam Video Tutor - 15/07/2026 22:16 EDT
desc:
# Railway LDCE MCQ Video Faculty (Remote | Part-Time | Long-Term)

### Compensation

* ₹8,000–15,000 per month (Based on experience and quality)
* Long-term opportunity with performance-based increments

---

## About Us

We are building a premium YouTube channel dedicated to **Indian Railway LDCE (30%), JE, SSE, AME and Mechanical Department examinations**.

Our mission is to become India's highest-quality Railway exam learning platform through concept-based question analysis.

We are looking for a passionate educator who can explain Railway exam questions in a clear, engaging, and student-friendly manner.

---

## Your Role

This is **NOT** a content writing or research job.

We will provide:

* Railway question banks
* Answer keys
* Topic sequence
* Reference notes (where required)

Your responsibility is to record professional educational videos explaining the questions.

---

## Responsibilities

For every assigned question bank:

* Read each question clearly.
* Explain the correct answer.
* Explain why the remaining options are incorrect (where applicable).
* Teach the underlying concept in simple language.
* Share memory tricks and exam tips wherever possible.
* Maintain a classroom-style teaching approach.
* Record the lecture in a professional and engaging manner.

---

## Video Format

* Duration: 60–120 minutes
* HD Video (1080p)
* Clear audio
* Screen sharing with PowerPoint or PDF
* Face camera preferred but not mandatory
* English or Hindi (Odia is an added adva

title: iBwave RF Engineer – 4G/5G Indoor DAS Design & Simulation Shopping Mall DAS Design
desc:
Pls contact only if you have the experience and can provide some samples from your previous DAS project. 

Responsibilities
Design and simulate Indoor Distributed Antenna Systems (DAS) using iBwave Design.
Perform RF planning and coverage analysis for LTE, 5G, and, if required, GSM/UMTS networks.
Develop complete iBwave project files (.ibw) for commercial and public buildings (airports, office buildings, shopping malls, hospitals, hotels, etc.).
Select and optimize DAS components, including RRUs, antennas, splitters, couplers, combiners, feeders, and passive RF equipment.
Generate RF coverage prediction maps (RSRP, SINR, RSSI) and ensure coverage meets customer requirements.
Prepare Bill of Materials (BOM), RF link budget calculations, and technical documentation.
Optimize existing DAS designs based on simulation results and customer requirements.
Requirements
Minimum 2 years of hands-on experience with iBwave Design.
Strong knowledge of Passive and Active DAS architecture.
Experience designing LTE and 5G Indoor DAS networks.
Solid understanding of RF propagation, link budget calculations, and feeder loss analysis.
Experience with DAS equipment from vendors such as CommScope, JMA, Rosenberger, Huawei, ZTE, Ericsson, or similar.
Ability to independently complete the entire DAS design process from planning to final documentation.
iBwave certification is an advantage.
Good English communication skills.
Preferred Qualifications
Experience designing DAS for airports, stadiums, tun

title: Authentic UGC Video Creation Needed
desc:
I need a UGC video creator who can film and edit authentic, relatable clips that feel native to social media while still following the creative brief I supply. Your own camera phone or mirrorless setup is fine as long as the lighting is flattering, the audio is crisp, and the footage arrives in at least 1080p (4K preferred).

You’ll receive a short script or talking-point outline for each assignment. From there, you handle everything on your side—framing, performance, basic cuts, light colour correction, captions, and royalty-free background music—so the file I receive is ready to post on Instagram Reels, TikTok, or YouTube Shorts. Consistency in tone is more important than heavy motion graphics; the goal is genuine connection that nudges viewers to take action.

Deliverables for each brief
• 1 finished vertical video, 15–60 seconds  
• Separate exported SRT or burned-in captions  
• All raw takes (for future edits)  

I’ll review the first cut and leave timestamped notes; one revision round is included. Typical turnaround I’m aiming for is three days per video, but let me know your realistic schedule and rate when you share your portfolio links. Looking forward to seeing how you bring stories to life on camera.

title: Virtual Acting Contest Mentor Needed
desc:
I run an ongoing virtual acting contest that culminates in a live-streamed showcase every week, and I want each performer to walk away stronger than they were seven days earlier. I’m looking for a mentor who can step in immediately and coach the cast—beginners, intermediates, and the occasional advanced actor—through every phase of their weekly scene work.

Here is where your guidance will matter most:
• Script analysis and interpretation so every beat lands with intention.
• Improvisation skills that keep scenes fresh and performers fearless.
• On-camera techniques to tighten framing, eyeline, and subtlety for both our live and online audiences.

The rhythm is quick: actors practice scenes, we rehearse, and then we stream the final cut and present a live segment. I’ll slot you into that workflow for a focused group session early in the week and individual notes as needed before showtime. Clear, actionable feedback and a supportive tone are non-negotiable; these performers thrive on encouragement combined with practical fixes.

If you can hop on Zoom, demonstrate techniques in real time, and send concise follow-up notes or video examples, you’ll fit perfectly. Let me know how you prefer to structure sessions and any specific tools or platforms you already use for virtual coaching. I’m eager to make next week’s showcase our best yet.
